extra_commands: which google-chrome chromium chromium-browser 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo NO_CHROME

cd /tmp && for p in '' '/pricing' '/templates'; do url="https://qrbanner.com$p"; name=$(echo "$p" | sed 's|/|_|g'); [ -z "$name" ] && name=home; CHROME_PATH=$(which google-chrome chromium chromium-browser 2>/dev/null | head -1); npx --yes lighthouse "$url" --only-categories=performance --chrome-flags='--headless --no-sandbox --disable-gpu' --output=json --output-path="/tmp/lh_$name.json" --quiet 2>/dev/null; node -e "try{const r=require('/tmp/lh_$name.json');const a=r.audits;console.log('$name PERF='+Math.round(r.categories.performance.score*100)+' LCP='+a['largest-contentful-paint'].displayValue+' TBT='+a['total-blocking-time'].displayValue+' CLS='+a['cumulative-layout-shift'].displayValue+' FCP='+a['first-contentful-paint'].displayValue)}catch(e){console.log('$name AUDIT_FAILED')}"; done
